channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Mini, reg.WO19 LBV, has been parked outside our house now for five weeks without moving, it has not been issued with a parking ticket, just wondering if it has been abandoned., 1st June
item.description:
Millbrook Street, Cheltenham.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Brookbank Close, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building materials such as timber left in the park behind the gate of one of the houses., 1st June
item.description:
Been there for a 2-3 weeks at least. Inbetween the rear fence of approx No 9 or 11 Clyde Crescent and the hedging in the park.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Clyde Crescent, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
